subject: Super Saiyan Son Goku in orange and blue gi, mid-combat energy pose with golden spiky hair and crackling aura
description: A humanoid figure with spiky golden hair stands in a dynamic forward-leaning combat stance, arms extended and fists charged with energy. The figure wears an orange and blue martial arts gi. A bright crackling yellow-white energy aura radiates outward from the body, filling the frame with electricity-like tendrils. The background is a cool blue-white burst of light and energy. The composition is a mid-shot with the figure slightly off-center, facing toward the viewer.
foreground: Spiky golden-haired humanoid in orange and blue gi, energy aura, combat stance
background: Radiant energy burst, electric tendrils, cool blue-white light
